sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14293" key="a)poxeirotonhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπο-χειροτονητέον</orth>, <sense id="n14293.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must reject a claim to,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοῦ ἀρίστου</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:22:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22.5</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
